title: PricingData
description: Normalized pricing information used to display current smartphone prices.

phoneId.description: Canonical slug matching the phone-specs id, e.g. galaxy-s26-ultra.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. USD, EUR, GBP.

source.description: Name of the pricing source, e.g. Samsung Official Store or Apple Store.

url.description: URL of the product page where the price was retrieved.

date.description: Date the price was observed, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fetchedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was fetched.
